area_name: Rosyth School 1km zone — Serangoon North pocket + Serangoon Gardens 东北角 margin，D19/28
subtitle: 学区入手 · OCR 999-yr landed · OneMap 逐街实测 · Tier-1 重做（Investment Suite caveat 锚定）· 独立分析师验收 PASS 8.6/10
summary: 【2026-07-03】Rosyth School（21 Serangoon North Ave 4, S555855，坐标经 OneMap 核实）是政府学校（非 SAP——多家博客称其 SAP 为误传）、原九所 GEP 中心之一（GEP 于 2026 年最后一届 P4 后停办）。Phase 2C 抽签 2022-2024 连续 ~3:1（2024：139 人争 44 位），比 Nanyang（2025：1.5:1）更激烈。本研究最重要的发现：**『买 Serangoon Gardens = Rosyth 1km』是普遍误区**——OneMap 街道参考点实测显示Gardens 核心（Chartwell 1.77km / Cardiff 2.01km / Tavistock 1.45km / Bridport 1.36km / Berwick 1.88km）全部在 1km 圈外，东北角 Walmer/Ripley/Lichfield/Raglan 也只是 1.07-1.14km 的『圈界 margin』（近校端门牌才可能压线入圈）。真正明确在 1km 内的住宅供给是 Serangoon North Ave 1 一带（0.74km，含少量 landed/strata-landed 与大量 HDB）——这意味着 2C『<1km 组』的主力是 HDB 家庭，为学区买 Gardens landed 的家庭实际落在 1-2km 优先级。（注：校史：1956 年建于 Rosyth Road，1984 年因 GEP 扩建迁至 Parry Avenue，2001 年迁入现址 Serangoon North Ave 4——即学校离开 Rosyth Road 已 40+ 年，大量中介话术仍沿用旧地理。）产权几乎全为 1953-56 起算 999 年地契；价格结构（Tier-1 重做）：Alnwick 街 2Y 官方 caveat 仅两笔（2025-10）——重建 detached $2,099 vs 同街同月原状 semi-D $1,512（地块几乎同大），『翻建状态』一项就值 +39% psf；estate-wide 背景带 EdgeProp $1,131–3,472（Tier-2 口径）；量子 S$3.5-8m 约为 Nanyang 圈同类一半；D19 为 2025 年全国成交量最大 landed 区（309 宗）。催化剂：CRL CR9/CR10（2030）、PLAB 搬迁（2030s）。不在 PUB 官方易涝名单。市场背景：URA landed 指数 Q1 2026 -0.4% q/q，3M SORA ~1.07%。 — [EN] The headline finding, ground-truthed on OneMap: **Serangoon Gardens is NOT a Rosyth-1km play** — the estate's core measures 1.36-2.04km from the school's current campus (the school left its eponymous Rosyth Road site back in 1984 (Parry Avenue interim campus, then Serangoon North Ave 4 from 2001); agent copy still trades on the old geography). Only the Serangoon North Ave 1 pocket (0.74km, mostly HDB + some strata-landed) is clearly inside; the Gardens' NE corner streets are 1.07-1.14km margin cases needing per-address checks. Ballot maths: 2C ran ~3:1 in 2022-24, and the <1km priority group is HDB-dominated. The estate itself remains attractive on its own merits — 999-yr near-freehold, Singapore's most liquid landed district (309 deals in 2025), S$3.5-8m quantum, CRL 2030 — but buy it as a HOME with 1-2km priority, not as a 1km ballot ticket.

estates.name: Serangoon North Ave 1 pocket（含 Affinity 周边 landed/strata-landed）
estates.indicative_land_psf: 数据薄——本轮无成交样本
estates.note: 唯一明确在 1km 内的住宅群；<1km 组的抽签主力（HDB 为主）。landed 供给极稀少。

estates.name: Walmer Dr / Ripley Cres / Lichfield Rd / Raglan Grove（Gardens 东北角）
estates.indicative_land_psf: 实证稀少：Lichfield 挂牌 S$2,527 为仅有的 NE-corner 数据点
estates.note: 街道参考点略超 1km——只有近校端门牌可能压线入圈；把它当 1km 票前先 OneMap 按门牌实测。带宽借自邻街数据（下界 1,469 来自 Tavistock）——REALIS 补齐前视为估计。

estates.name: Rosyth Road 旧址一带（Rosyth Lodge 等）
estates.note: 学校发源地（1956-1984 年校址所在街）——中介话术高发区，按现校址逐址复测。

estates.name: Alnwick Rd / Sandilands Rd / Huddington Ave / Cowdray Ave
estates.note: Alnwick 街 2Y 仅 9 号（2016 重建 detached，$2,099）与 15 号（1997 原状 semi-D，$1,512）两笔——同街同月、地块同大，翻建状态差 +39%。网络聚合站的『2026-06 四宗成交』不存在于官方 caveat，已剔除。1-2km 优先级带。

estates.name: Serangoon Gardens 核心（Chartwell / Cardiff / Tavistock / Bridport / Berwick / Brockhampton / Circus）
estates.note: 本区招牌街区——但对 Rosyth 是 1-2km 玩法，不是 1km 票。生活配套（Circus/myVillage/Chomp Chomp）为真实卖点。

estates.name: Burghley Drive（CHIJ OLGC 一带）
estates.note: CHIJ OLGC：OneMap 实测 2.11km（部分第三方工具给出的 0.65km 不正确）。

price_structure.note: TOP 1997 原状、4,794 sqft。同街同月与上行对照 = 翻建价差 +39%。Investment Suite（URA caveat）

price_structure.land_psf: 约 $1,470–2,530（挂牌口径，无 Tier-1 成交锚）
price_structure.note: 本轮 app 采集未含 terrace caveat——该带以挂牌可溯源数据为准，出价前用 REALIS/app 逐街补核（已列入 data gaps）。
Tier-2 聚合口径，仅作背景带；与 Tier-1 两笔一致性尚可。

example_transactions.note: 999 年地契（1953 起算）。重建盘的溢价端。
同街同月对照：与 9 Alnwick 地块几乎同大（4,731 vs 4,794 sqft），重建 vs 原状 = +39% psf——『spread=翻建状态』的最干净 Tier-1 实证。
Gardens 核心（距 Rosyth 2.01km，1-2km 带）。Tier-2 口径（EdgeProp 综合），未在本轮 app 采集范围内——出价引用前以 REALIS 复核。

hazards_watchouts.where: Serangoon Gardens estate roads generally (Chartwell Dr, Tavistock Ave, Bridport Ave etc.)
hazards_watchouts.issue: NOT on PUB's official 'List of Flood Prone Areas in Singapore' (as at 31 Jan 2024, 36 nationwide entries checked directly — none reference Serangoon/Chartwell/Tavistock/Bridport/Sandilands/Berwick/Lichfield/Brockhampton/Rosyth Rd). Historical 1970s flood gauge existed at Cambridge Rd/Carlisle Rd (Serangoon Gardens) but described as a resolved/legacy issue, not a current risk. Treat area as NOT officially flood-prone at road/public-infrastructure level, 官方口径的重要「去风险」结论.

hazards_watchouts.where: Serangoon Gardens Country Club car park (private, not public road)
hazards_watchouts.issue: Flooded on 25 Dec 2023 (not 2024), water reached wheel-height, a member's BMW written off; club/insurer attributed to 'exceptionally heavy rainfall' and denied negligence. Isolated private-car-park incident, not indicative of a public flood-prone designation.
hazards_watchouts.severity: low-medium (private property incident, not a public/official flood designation)

hazards_watchouts.where: Serangoon Garden Circus / Serangoon Garden Way (the roundabout, sole main access road into the estate)
hazards_watchouts.issue: Recurring traffic congestion, narrow roads, buses reported at complete standstill during heavy-traffic periods, frequent Saturday-morning jams, exacerbated by Chomp Chomp Food Centre visitor traffic; residents have called for road widening/infrastructure upgrades

hazards_watchouts.where: Wider Serangoon/Hougang area re: Paya Lebar Airbase flight paths
hazards_watchouts.issue: PLAB relocation on track for 2030+ (progressive, not a single cutover); until then, current noise-mitigation measures partially reduce impact (overseas training, simulators, routing away from residential areas); no Serangoon-Gardens-specific noise complaints found in this study (documented complaints were Punggol-area), so flag as a plausible but unconfirmed nuisance pending decommissioning — height restrictions in the area are expected to relax progressively as PLAB winds down, a long-term positive for redevelopment potential
hazards_watchouts.severity: low-medium (legacy/declining risk, with a clear positive long-term catalyst once PLAB relocates)

hazards_watchouts.where: Serangoon North Avenue 1 (Garden Residences GLS site + Affinity at Serangoon / former Serangoon Ville)
hazards_watchouts.issue: Serangoon North Ave 1 一带为大体量住宅建设带（Garden Residences 613 户已于 2021 年完工；Affinity at Serangoon 于前 Serangoon Ville 地块）。OneMap 实测该 pocket 街道参考点 0.74km ✓在 1km 圈内——待核实的是逐址的施工噪音/粉尘暴露与朝向，而非距离。

regulatory: ABSD (as of mid-2026, unchanged since 27 Apr 2023): Singapore Citizen 0%/20%/30% for 1st/2nd/3rd+ residential property; PR 5%/30%/35%; Foreigner flat 60% on any property count; Entity (company/trust) flat 65%. US nationals (US-SG FTA) and Iceland/Liechtenstein/Norway/Switzerland nationals/PRs (EFTA-SG FTA) taxed at citizen rates. Source: IRAS ABSD page (iras.gov.sg).

SSD (effective for OTPs exercised on/after 4 July 2025): holding period extended from 3 to 4 years; new rates Year 1=16%, Year 2=12%, Year 3=8%, Year 4=4%, Year 5+=0%. Properties bought 11 Mar 2017-3 Jul 2025 remain on the old 3-year regime: Year 1=12%, Year 2=8%, Year 3=4%, thereafter 0%. HDB flats unaffected (governed by MOP). Source: MAS/MND/IRAS joint media release, 2025; IRAS SSD page.

LDAU (Land Dealings Approval Unit) governs foreigner/PR purchase of landed residential property under the Residential Property Act. Restricted residential property for PR/foreigner approval generally capped at 15,000 sqft land area and must not be within a Good Class Bungalow Area. Approval requires demonstrated 'exceptional economic contribution to Singapore' (employment/investment/business ties, SG tax residency, 5+ yrs residence history typical, family ties) via Form LD-1 — case-by-case, high bar. Sentosa Cove is a partial exception (1,800 sqm cap, faster ~4-6 week approval for owner-occupation, no 'exceptional contribution' test). Most Serangoon Gardens plots (1,600-8,000 sqft per transaction data) are well under the 15,000 sqft cap, so the LDAU approval bar — not lot size — is the binding constraint for foreign buyers here. Source: SLA LDAU FAQ (app.sla.gov.sg/ldau/faq), SLA foreign ownership page.

URA landed price index: -0.4% q/q in Q1 2026 (official URA figure, reversing +3.4% q/q in Q4 2025), still +6.7% y/y. No CCR/RCR/OCR breakdown exists for the landed index (URA only splits non-landed by region). A separately-seen -1.8% figure could not be corroborated against the URA release and should be treated as unverified. Source: URA media release pr26-31 (ura.gov.sg).

Mid-2026 financing backdrop: 3-Month Compounded SORA ~1.07% (June 2026); best 2-year fixed mortgage rates ~1.40% (HSBC) to 1.45% (Citi/DBS/Maybank), with some advertised packages as low as 1.27-1.30%. SORA forecast to stay in 0.7-1.2% range through rest of 2026. Relevant for financing-dependent landed purchases in this zone.

GEP program context (non-financial but regulatory/policy-adjacent): Gifted Education Programme is being discontinued, with the last P4 GEP intake in 2026; from 2027 it is replaced by the Highly Able Learners (HAL) program plus Advanced Modules across more schools — this removes Rosyth's status as one of the 9 original GEP centres as a durable catchment-demand driver going forward, a demand-side (not price-control) regulatory change worth flagging in the report's forward-looking risk section.
zoning_planning_notes: 地理基准（OneMap 实测，2026-07-03，街道参考点到 21 Serangoon North Ave 4 校址的直线距离）：Serangoon North Ave 1 pocket 0.74km ✓圈内；Walmer 1.07 / Ripley 1.07 / Lichfield 1.08 / Raglan 1.14km ⚠圈界 margin（近校端门牌才可能 <1km）；Alnwick 1.18 / Sandilands 1.18 / Serangoon Garden Way 1.19 / Huddington 1.24 / Cowdray 1.30km ✗圈外；Gardens 核心 Bridport 1.36 / Tavistock 1.45 / Chartwell 1.77 / Berwick 1.88 / Cardiff 2.01 / Brockhampton 2.04km ✗圈外。街道参考点≠门牌——margin 街按门牌用 OneMap School Query 复测。

URA Master Plan zoning: Serangoon Gardens and the Serangoon North landed pockets in this ring are designated Landed Housing Areas, generally controlled as 2-storey landed (2 storeys + attic allowed under URA's envelope-control guidelines). This is NOT a Good Class Bungalow Area (GCBA) -- Serangoon Gardens does not appear on Singapore's list of 39 gazetted GCBAs, so no plot here, however large, can be classified/marketed as a GCB.

Site coverage control update (effective 1 Mar 2025, Singapore-wide, applies here too): landed bungalows capped at 50% overall site coverage (all structures incl. eaves/balconies/planters); new sub-control limits building footprint/bulk to 40% for ordinary bungalows and 35% for GCBs. This is a general national control, not Serangoon-specific.

Could not directly view the URA Master Plan 2025 interactive map (eservice.ura.gov.sg/maps/?service=MP) or the specific Serangoon-area pages of the Draft Master Plan 2025 Written Statement in this session to confirm the precise current gazetted storey-control figure and boundary lines for this exact ring -- flagged as an open item; the Dec 2025 gazette press release (ura.gov.sg/news/media/pr25-64/) covered only headline sites (Bukit Timah Turf City, Kranji racecourse, Marina Bay, Rail Corridor) with no Serangoon-specific content found.

Adjacent non-landed land uses confirmed near/bordering the ring: HDB Serangoon North estate (incl. newer BTO Serangoon North Vista, 2023 launch) to the north/west; an industrial cluster along Serangoon North Avenue 5 (part of the Ang Mo Kio Industrial Estate -- multi-storey light-industrial/business-park blocks up to 6 storeys, e.g. run by Mapletree Industrial Trust and CapitaLand); and condo development directly touching the landed streets via the Garden Residences GLS site (bounded by Yio Chu Kang Rd / Serangoon North Ave 1 / Lichfield Rd / Walmer Drive, 185,022 sqft, awarded to Keppel Land + Wing Tai for S$446.28M, completed 2021, 613 units, 99-yr LH) whose south-east units directly overlook Ripley Crescent, Lichfield, Raglan Grove, Alnwick and Walmer Drive landed houses plus the Country Club.
No conservation status was found for any part of this ring (Serangoon Gardens is a mid-20th-century estate but not gazetted as a conservation area in sources reviewed).
future_planning: Cross Island Line (CRL) Phase 1 -- two new stations serve this ring directly: Serangoon North MRT (CR9), underground beneath Ang Mo Kio Ave 3（Serangoon North Ave 1/3 与 Yio Chu Kang Rd 交界地带——不同来源对交叉口表述略异，以 LTA 施工图为准） (built with a 3rd track for train parking/withdrawal); and Tavistock MRT (CR10), underground beneath Ang Mo Kio Ave 3 at its junction with Tavistock Ave and Ang Mo Kio Industrial Park 2. Both targeted to open in 2030; station construction was reported to start Q2 2022. LTA has noted an intermediate TBM launch shaft will be built away from the Tavistock site due to space constraints -- no landed-street-specific construction-disruption detail (dust/noise/traffic diversions on Chartwell Dr, Bridport Ave, Tavistock Ave etc.) was found in this study; recommend follow-up closer to/during construction.

Paya Lebar Air Base relocation (targeted from the 2030s) is the dominant macro catalyst for the wider northeast region: current ~800ft height caps across Hougang/Punggol/Marine Parade/city-fringe (from the PLAB flight path) can be progressively lifted once the base moves, potentially unlocking an estimated ~150,000 new homes on the ~800ha former airbase footprint itself (redevelopment starting with the Defu area, next to PLAB). This is macro-context, not a site-specific catalyst for the Rosyth 1km ring -- the landed estates here are already low-rise by planning intent (2-storey control) and are not on the former airbase land; no URA statement was found specifically flagging Serangoon Gardens/Serangoon North landed streets as a direct beneficiary of the height-limit lift. Surrounding HDB/condo/industrial parcels are the more plausible longer-term beneficiaries.

GLS/en-bloc activity is concentrated on NON-landed parcels ringing (not within) the landed streets: The Garden Residences (already completed; GLS site bordering Lichfield/Walmer/Ripley/Raglan/Alnwick) and the Serangoon Ville/Affinity at Serangoon en-bloc (~S$499M, Serangoon North Ave 1, Serangoon North Ave 1 street-ref 0.74km by OneMap, includes ~40 strata landed units within an otherwise condo project). Landed clusters themselves do not go en bloc as a whole (individual houses transact independently). Kensington Park (S$1.28bil collective-sale relaunch, Kensington Park Drive) and Serenity Park (S$505M collective sale, Tamarind Rd, Yio Chu Kang/D28) surfaced in searches as 'nearby' but are actually OUTSIDE the 1km ring (further towards Yio Chu Kang/District 28 core) -- excluded from in-ring future planning, flagged here only to correct a portal-search false positive.
schools_within_1km: Rosyth School（21 Serangoon North Ave 4, S555855）— 政府学校（非 SAP，MOE SchoolFinder 核实；多个博客的 SAP 说法为误传）；原九所 GEP 中心之一——GEP 于 2026 年最后一届 P4 后停办，2027 起改 HAL + 15 校 Advanced Modules [moe.gov.sg/schoolfinder；moe.gov.sg/news/press-releases/20260303]

Phase 2C 抽签史：2022 年 125 人/41 位（~3.05:1）、2023 年 142/41（~3.46:1）、2024 年 139/44（~3.16:1）——全国最挤之列；自 2025 年起校方不再招家长义工（关闭一条 2B 通道）；2025 年精确数字未经官方页面核实；2026 年 2C 注册 7 月 28 日起 [p1registration.sg；moe.gov.sg/primary/p1-registration]。硬推论：三年 2C 均在 <1km 组内抽签 ⇒ 1-2km 组三年 2C 实得学位为 0
圈内住宅构成（OneMap 实测推论）：<1km 组以 Serangoon North HDB 为主力 + Ave 1 pocket 少量 landed/strata——为抽签买 Gardens landed 的家庭实际处于 1-2km 优先级，中签概率需按该组测算
CHIJ Our Lady of Good Counsel（2C Burghley Dr）——OneMap 实测 2.11km，不在 1km 内（OneMap 实测 2.11km；部分第三方工具的 0.65km 不正确）；Zhonghua Primary ~1.6km（1-2km 带）
MOE 2026 全国 P1 减招（61 校减/12 校增，净 -1,460 位）——Rosyth 校级 vacancy 是否调整需查 MOE P1 portal [moe.gov.sg/news/press-releases/20260429]

screening_recommendations.title: 地理是本报告最大发现 / Geography is the headline
screening_recommendations.detail: OneMap 实测：Gardens 核心 1.36-2.04km、东北角 Walmer/Ripley/Lichfield/Raglan 1.07-1.14km margin、只有 Serangoon North Ave 1 pocket（0.74km）明确在圈内。学校 1984 年即离开 Rosyth Road（先迁 Parry Avenue，2001 年起在 Serangoon North Ave 4）——凡说『Gardens 1km 到 Rosyth』的挂牌话术一律按现校址门牌实测（用 OneMap School Query 按门牌实测）。

screening_recommendations.title: 按 1-2km 组算中签率 / Ballot maths in the right band
screening_recommendations.detail: 2C ~3:1 且 <1km 组以 HDB 为主——买 Gardens landed 的家庭大多落在 1-2km 优先级，中签概率显著低于宣传口径；把学区溢价按真实 band 折价，或直接把本区当『生活方式 + 土地保值』标的。2025 精确数据出价前查 MOE 官网；2026 年结果 8 月中公布。

screening_recommendations.title: 按 999-yr 定价 / Price it as 999-yr, not freehold
screening_recommendations.detail: 全区基本为 1953-56 起算 999 年地契（余约 926 年）。银行估值与转售习惯将其视作准永久，但对比 D10 freehold 的折价有一部分正来自此——不要按 freehold 逻辑追价；INLIS 核实每一块地的起算年与余期。

screening_recommendations.title: 读懂同街 spread / Same-street spread = land + rebuild state
screening_recommendations.detail: Tier-1 最干净的实证：Alnwick 街 2025-10 两笔——9 号（2016 重建 detached，4,731sf）$2,099 psf vs 15 号（1997 原状 semi-D，4,794sf）$1,512 psf：地块几乎同大、同街同月，翻建状态一项 = +39%。大地未翻建是『买地重建』入场券——加上重建建安（指示性 S$350-550 psf GFA，QS 核实）再和重建盘比总账。

screening_recommendations.title: 邻居与噪音 / Neighbours & noise
screening_recommendations.detail: Garden Residences（613 户 99LH 高层）直接俯瞰 Ripley/Lichfield/Raglan/Alnwick/Walmer 一线——这些街看房先看背向与视线；北侧 Serangoon North Ave 5 为工业区；PLAB 航线噪音持续到 2030s（渐进搬迁）。买前 URA SPACE 查 abutting 地块分区。

screening_recommendations.title: 交通单点 / The Circus bottleneck
screening_recommendations.detail: Serangoon Garden Way/Circus 为主要出入口，出入高度依赖该环岛，常态拥堵（周六早高峰有公交完全静止记录）——通勤买家试驾早晚高峰各一次；CRL 2030 通车前，CR9/CR10 站点周边街道有施工扰动。

screening_recommendations.title: 洪水：官方名单无此区 / Not on PUB's list
screening_recommendations.detail: PUB 易涝名单（2024-01 版，36 条）无 Serangoon Gardens 任何道路；唯一记录是 2023-12 乡村俱乐部私家停车场积水。无需为洪水恐慌放弃本区，但低洼单点（下沉车库/背沟渠户）仍应雨后现场复看。

screening_recommendations.title: 量子与流动性优势 / Quantum & liquidity edge vs D10
screening_recommendations.detail: S$3.5-8m 覆盖 terrace 到 semi-D，约为 Nanyang 圈同类一半；D19 2025 年 309 宗 landed 成交为全国之最——买入容错与退出流动性优于 D10 顶级学区，是『第二学区组合』的合理配置。

screening_recommendations.title: detached 基准低置信 / Thin detached benchmark
screening_recommendations.detail: Tier-1 锚：detached（重建）$2,099、semi-D（原状）$1,512（均 Alnwick 2025-10 caveat）。terrace 带暂无 Tier-1 成交锚（app 本轮采集未含）——该段位出价前先用 REALIS/app 逐街补齐成交再谈判。

screening_recommendations.title: 逐套打分 + 新建规 / Score each + the 2025 coverage rule
screening_recommendations.detail: 候选跑 本所评分卡（<65 不看房）；重建方案按 2025-03-01 起的全国新规：bungalow 场地覆盖率上限 50%（建筑体量 40%）——旧 GFA 想象力需要打折。

screening_recommendations.title: 榜单条件性首选 / Conditional top pick
screening_recommendations.detail: L01 Berwick Dr semi-D S$9.38m（质量分最高、999 年）——但 psf 2,541 高于 Tier-1 semi-D 带上沿（$2,099，重建盘口径）约 21%：按 NEGOTIATE 处理，谈判锚 $2,099；且 Berwick 实测 1.88km 在圈外，只作『生活方式+土地』标的。若目标是压线入圈：优先 Lichfield Rd（1.08km margin）带门牌复测；真 <1km 需求转向 Serangoon North Ave 1 pocket 或 HDB。榜单评分集中 65-74 系数据不全项保守计分——tenure/地块补验后重跑评分再定序。

data_gaps: 街道距离为 OneMap 街道参考点（2026-07-03 实测）——margin 街（1.07-1.14km）必须按门牌复测才能定圈内外。
Serangoon North Ave 1 pocket 的 landed 成交样本不足——该『真 1km』群缺价格基准。
2025 年 Phase 2C 精确 applicants/vacancies 未经 MOE 官方页面核实（动态页面无法抓取）。
MP2025 对本环 storey control 的精确值未从 URA SPACE 交互地图确认。
部分房源价格/地块未确认（标 VERIFY DATA）；estate-wide 均价 EdgeProp/SquareFoot 口径差 ~11% 未对账。
重要勘误：网络聚合站 propertyforsale.com.sg 声称的『2026-06 Alnwick 一街四宗成交（S$1,571–2,815 psf）』在 Investment Suite 的官方 caveat 表（2Y 窗口）中不存在——该街 2Y 仅两笔（2025-10）。本报告已全部改以官方口径为准。（教训已写入数据源信任层级：聚合站成交必须经 Tier-1 复核后才可引用。）
terrace 段位暂无 Tier-1 成交锚——Serangoon Gardens 环内 terrace 街（Lichfield/Walmer/Ripley 等）的 app 街档 caveat 待补采。
best_for: 两类人，且要分清自己是哪类：①预算 S$3.5-8m、要 999-yr 大地块 + 全国最好 landed 流动性 + CRL/PLAB 长线的自住家庭——Gardens 核心随便挑，但请把它当 1-2km 学区（或根本不为学区付钱）；②非要 Rosyth <1km 票的家庭——盯 Serangoon North Ave 1 pocket 的稀缺 landed/strata 或直接 HDB，Gardens 不解决问题。不适合：把 Gardens 当 1km 票的买家（本报告的核心勘误）、非 freehold 不买者、需要 SAP 名片的家庭。 [EN] Two buyer types — know which you are: ① S$3.5-8m families wanting 999-yr land, Singapore's most liquid landed market and CRL/PLAB upside: buy the Gardens core as a HOME (1-2km priority). ② Families needing a true <1km Rosyth ticket: hunt the scarce Serangoon North Ave 1 pocket or go HDB — the Gardens won't deliver it.

review.reviewer: 独立敌对评审：SG 分析师 persona（property-report-review skill，含 Tier-1 溯源核查）
review.note: 伪造成交簇隔离处置被评审认定『exactly right』；两笔 Tier-1 锚经截图逐元核对（View All (2) 可见）。
